description: INI file parser that handles sections, key-value pairs, comments, and multi-line values

description: ChainProvider that tries environment then profile credential providers in order
Resolve region from CLI arg > AWS_REGION env > AWS_DEFAULT_REGION env > profile config
Resolve output format from CLI arg > AWS_DEFAULT_OUTPUT env > profile config > default (json)
Profile selected by --profile CLI arg > AWS_PROFILE env > 'default'
notes: Session 1: ConfigProvider.resolve_profile() with tests for CLI and default
